allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for i, line in enumerate\(lines\): try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'user': content = obj.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = c.get\('text', ''\) if 'sargam notation' in text.lower\(\) or 'remaining nottuswaram' in text.lower\(\) or 'add sargam' in text.lower\(\): print\(f'=== LINE {i} ==='\) print\(text[:10000]\) print\('...'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) print\(f'Total lines: {len\(lines\)}'\) for i, line in enumerate\(lines[-20:], len\(lines\)-20\): try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg_type = obj.get\('type', 'unknown'\) content = obj.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = c.get\('text', ''\) print\(f'LINE {i} [{msg_type}]: {text[:200]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'LINE {i} [{msg_type}]: {content[:200]}'\) except Exception as e: print\(f'LINE {i} ERROR: {e}'\) ")
